questions.question: A 21-year-old woman has suffered a gunshot wound to her abdomen. After examining the patient's angiogram, the surgeon locates the bleeding source from the lesser omentum's free margin. Which of the following structures is most likely to be injured?
options: Superior mesenteric artery and portal vein
Inferior mesenteric artery and portal vein

questions.question: A surgeon enters the peritoneal space located anterior to the stomach during an abdominal operation. This space constitutes the main compartment of the peritoneal cavity. Which space has the surgeon entered?
During abdominal surgery, a surgeon passes through the epiploic (omental) foramen and enters a peritoneal compartment located posterior to the stomach. Which space has been entered?
